name: Solutions North Bank
description_short: Solutions North Bank is a community bank offering consumer accounts and loans online with physical branches across Kansas.
description_long:
Solutions North Bank operates as a traditional community bank serving Kansas customers through multiple branch locations including Stockton, Hill City, Norton, WaKeeney, and Coffeyville. The bank emphasizes convenient digital banking options, allowing customers to open consumer accounts and loans entirely online while maintaining a physical branch presence for in-person service.

The bank offers standard consumer banking services including account opening and loan origination through both online and branch channels. They provide ATM access across their service area and maintain a focus on security and privacy in their operations. Their service model combines modern digital convenience with traditional community banking relationships.

Solutions North Bank distinguishes itself through its multi-channel approach, offering online account opening for customers who prefer digital convenience while maintaining staffed branch locations for those who prefer face-to-face interactions. The bank identifies with the "SNB Way" as their service philosophy, emphasizing security and privacy as core values.

As a community bank, Solutions North Bank has a limited geographic footprint restricted to Kansas locations. The website content provided does not detail specific loan products, interest rates, fees, or comprehensive service offerings. Prospective customers would need to contact the bank directly or visit branches to understand full product availability, competitive rates, and specific terms. The bank holds NMLS# 404921 and operates with routing number 101103327. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
pros: Online account and loan opening available 24/7 without branch visit
Multiple physical branch locations across Kansas for in-person service
ATM network access across service area for cash withdrawals
Emphasis on security and privacy as stated core values
Community bank model allowing local relationship banking
FDIC-regulated institution (evidenced by routing number and NMLS registration)
cons: Geographic service limited to five Kansas towns only
Minimal product details provided on website; rates and fees not transparent
No online account management tools or mobile app described on website
No specific loan products, terms, or competitive rates published
Limited digital service information despite emphasis on online convenience
best_for: Kansas residents in Stockton, Hill City, Norton, WaKeeney, or Coffeyville seeking local banking
Customers who prefer combining online convenience with in-person branch access
Consumers seeking traditional community bank relationships over large national institutions
diagnosis: Solutions North Bank is best for Kansas residents in their service areas who want traditional community banking combined with online account opening. The main caveat is the extremely limited geographic footprint and lack of transparent product/pricing information, requiring direct contact for any specific banking decisions.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
